ItacPersonItem.Notes: On Portinari`s membership in the Elevati and Rinascenti Academies, see Bruno Brunelli Bonetti, `Francesco Portenari e le Cantate degli Accademici padovani`, in Atti del Reale Istituto Veneto di scienze, lettere e arti (1919-20), pp. 595-607.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
